benefits.description: Partner experienced prolonged erection after ~7 hours; significant effect

side_effects.description: Partner experienced persistent erection (priapism-like) that did not go away; kicked in after ~7 hours

protocol_notes: User and partner used 4mg PT-141 as a tolerance test. Initially thought it didn't work; partner woke user up in the middle of the night with a persistent erection after ~7 hours. Advises caution.
